title: Re-examining Psalm 55 as a Messianic psalm in light of Acts 1:16 and the dove sign, baptism as death into sheol
body:
# Re-examining Psalm 55 as a Messianic psalm in light of Acts 1:16 and the dove sign, baptism as death into sheol



## passages 
- Psalms 55:6
HB2 55:7 וָאֹמַר מִי־יִתֶּן־לִּי אֵבֶר כַּיּוֹנָה אָעוּפָה וְאֶשְׁכֹּנָה:
YLT And I say, 'Who doth give to me a pinion as a dove? I fly away and rest,
LEB So I say, “Oh, that I had wings like a dove. I would fly away and be at rest.
- pay special attention to Psalm 55:12-23
- Acts 1:16
SBLGNT Ἄνδρες ἀδελφοί, ἔδει πληρωθῆναι τὴν ⸀γραφὴν ἣν προεῖπε τὸ πνεῦμα τὸ ἅγιον διὰ στόματος Δαυὶδ περὶ Ἰούδα τοῦ γενομένου ὁδηγοῦ τοῖς συλλαβοῦσιν ⸀Ἰησοῦν,
YLT 'Men, brethren, it behoved this Writing that it be fulfilled that beforehand the Holy Spirit spake through the mouth of David, concerning Judas, who became guide to those who took Jesus,
LEB “Men and brothers, it was necessary that the scripture be fulfilled, which the Holy Spirit proclaimed beforehand through the mouth of David concerning Judas, who became a guide to those who arrested Jesus,
labels: Israel according to the flesh |  the Jewish people
Using the Torah and Prophets to read the New Coven
Foolish gospel | Messiah failed | weakness of God
